rows.source_ref: Intended source: babypips.com forex SMA page (captured 2015-10-09), per filename forex-sma-20151009.html.pdf. Captured content is a Cloudflare 'Sorry, you have been blocked / You are unable to access babypips.com' interstitial (Cloudflare Ray ID a1fad7e2185211d5), not the article body.
rows.concept: No strategy content present; the saved page is a Cloudflare access-denied block page rather than the intended babypips SMA article.
rows.eligibility_reason: Captured PDF contains only a Cloudflare block page, no strategy rules or edge to harvest.
rows.notes: Readable text, not image-only, but zero usable content. If a re-fetch of the babypips SMA article is desired, retrieve via a non-blocked path; generic single-SMA crossover material is typically low-value regardless.
